STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROHL, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 665 GEARY STREET #308 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAR-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. TO WAIVE RENT AND DAMAGES ON CONDITION DEFT. VACATES BY 3/31/95. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF. TO RETURN SECURITY DEPOSIT BY OPERATION OF LAW. IF DEFT. COMPLIES WITH THE STIPULATION, PLTF TO DISMISS THE ACTION. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
